subcodes.first_line: A Book from Our presence unto them that have turned unto and attained the knowledge of God according to a prescribed measure. O Báqir! Wert thou to apprehend [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدنا لمن اقبل و فاز بعرفان الله علی قدر معلوم یا باقر لو تعرف مقام
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @high station of learning, @chastisement and requital, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
